ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Maintains context, persona and naturalness well; however, could be more direct in tone to match the urgency.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Follows protocol but lacks immediate relevance and persona consistency with Gatekeeper's role; naturalness is acceptable as it avoids unnecessary detail.
